report.summary: Day 72 standup v21: BTC $71,300 (stable above $70K). F&G 9-11 (Extreme Fear, 46-day streak). DELTA: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained — all content promoted (~540+ unique slugs). SEO regression: 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle/RocketPool/MakerDAO/Ondo) missing metadata. ETF flows mixed: Fidelity $45.3M outflow Mar 25 but $167M net inflow Mar 23. Disk full in sandbox blocks bash. ~16 hrs to Thu convergence ($13.5B options + 91 SEC ETF rulings). 103 agent runs today ($8,300).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $71,300 (stable from v20 $70,600-$71,674 range). 43% below ATH ($126,080). Holding above $70K for 3+ consecutive days — geopolitical relief rally on US-Iran de-escalation reports. ETH ~$2,166-$2,327.
F&G INDEX: 9-11 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak below 25 — longest since FTX collapse. Sub-15 readings preceded 30-60 day recovery rallies in 7 of 9 instances since 2020.

SPOT ETF FLOWS (MIXED): Fidelity FBTC saw $45.3M outflow on Mar 25. But broader trend positive — $167M net inflow on Mar 23 ended a 3-day outflow streak (BlackRock IBIT $160.8M, Fidelity $41.7M). Q1 2026 cumulative: $18.7B inflows, total AUM past $128B. Cumulative all-time: $56.375B net inflows.

DELTA SINCE v20: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained — major milestone. All content now in PUBLISHED_PAGES (~540+ unique slugs across 21 batches today). EOD-v20 flagged SEO regression on 4 ecosystem pages. Disk full in sandbox now blocks bash execution.

TOP CONTENT: Fear & Greed Timeline, Options Calculator, ETF Guide, Congressional Tokenization, Tokenized RWA Guide — all 88%+ relevance. New: Tokenized Real Estate + Web3 Gaming/GameFi + ecosystem deep-dives (Pendle/RocketPool/MakerDAO/Yearn/Ondo) all promoted.
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~16 hrs): $13.5B on Deribit (BTC $10.2B + ETH $3.3B). Max pain $75K-$86K. Put/call 0.85. Gamma hedging intensifying.
SEC 91 ETF RULING (~16 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. 16 cryptos classified as commodities Mar 17.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🟢 MILESTONE: PUBLISH_QUEUE is now EMPTY — all pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. 845-line file with ~540+ unique slugs across 21 publish batches today.
🔴 BLOCKER [P0]: git index.lock status unknown — disk full in sandbox prevents bash verification. If still present, now 28+ hours old. 120+ uncommitted files.
🔴 BLOCKER [P0]: Disk full in sandbox (/sessions tmp dir) — blocks bash execution. Does NOT affect production but prevents local build verification.

🟡 SEO REGRESSION [P1]: 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Ondo) deployed as 'use client' with NO metadata export and NO layout.tsx. Missing title, description, OG tags, structured data. Yearn is correctly structured as reference.
DONE SINCE v20: EOD-v20 completed full QA pass, confirmed queue drain, flagged ecosystem metadata regression. Additional community (v14-v17), design (v12-v15), publish (v11-v14) cycles ran.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter 0/6 core API routes. CoinGecko free tier, no API key.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 154+ TS errors (6+ files). ~103 legacy slugs without page.tsx. ~120 learn pages missing OG images.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: ~44 pages promoted, 38+ learn guides built, 30+ OG images, 170+ social posts drafted, 36+ SVG cards, 55+ UX fixes across 103 agent cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — FIX ECOSYSTEM METADATA + CLEAR GIT BLOCKER + DEPLOY: 4 ecosystem pages (Pendle/RocketPool/MakerDAO/Ondo) have SEO regression — invisible to Google without metadata. Use Yearn pattern as template: add layout.tsx with Metadata export or refactor to server/client split. Then: clear index.lock → mass commit → push → Vercel redeploy. Thu convergence is ~16 hours away.

PRIORITY 2 — CONVERGENCE-READY CONTENT: All existing content is promoted. Next: (a) Options Expiry Recap template (pre-write for Thu $13.5B settlement), (b) SEC ETF Ruling Outcomes page (conditional angles for 91 applications), (c) Tax season refresh (19 days to April 15). These are the 3 highest-traffic opportunities in the next 48 hours.

PRIORITY 3 — TS ERROR TRIAGE + RATE LIMITER: 154+ TS errors across 6+ files (shielded by ignoreBuildErrors). Fix lido-v3 JSX escaping (bulk of errors). Wire rate limiter into 6 core API routes before CoinGecko rate-limits us during convergence traffic spike.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: ETF flows still net-positive ($18.7B Q1, $128B AUM) despite daily churn. Fidelity outflow ($45.3M) after $167M inflow = normal rebalancing. BTC holding $70K through 46-day extreme fear = structural support. Publish queue cleared = operational bandwidth freed. Thu convergence ($13.5B options + 91 SEC ETFs) is the biggest single-day catalyst of Q1 — our content library is positioned across every angle.
